name: Lifestyle: Hobbies
description:
Angry's Lifestyle: Hobbies

Are you looking to add more variety and depth to your survival experience in Project Zomboid? *Lifestyle: Hobbies* introduces a range of new interactions and activities, making everyday survival more engaging and rewarding.

Highlights:

- Discover new hobbies to pass the time and boost morale. - Play musical instruments, learn hundreds of songs, sing, form a band, and more. - Become the life of the party with functional jukeboxes, dj booths, disco balls and fully realized dance hobby with hundreds of dance moves. - Care for your survivor and turn your safehouse into a haven of cleanliness and tranquility with dozens of new interactible items and objects like mirrors, combs, bathtubs, showers, toothbrushes, sponges, perfumes, and more. - Perfect for players looking to personalize their experience or find new ways to engage with the game.
Rediscover the joy of hobbies and self-expression, even in the harshest of times.
Has sandbox options. Compatible with most other mods, except for mods that reduce the duration of timed actions.
